name: Honey-Bran Muffins from Bob Hogan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray the bottoms of 6 medium muffin cups (2 1/2" x 1 1/4") with nonstick cooking spray, or line them with paper baking cups.
3. Mix wheat bran and boiling water in a separate bowl; set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, beat together milk, brown sugar, oil, honey, and egg whites.
5. Stir in the reserved bran mixture and remaining ingredients until just combined (batter will be lumpy).
6. Divide batter evenly among the muffin cups (cups should be about 3/4 full). Optionally sprinkle with sugar if desired.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the pan immediately.
